data_sources.scoring_method: Rolling 252-day Z-score, equal-weighted 5 components per market

us_agent.narrative: SPY bounced slightly to $670.79 but RSI at 31.8 is getting close to oversold territory — that's usually where 'buy the dip' crowd starts getting loud again. Still below both SMA20 and SMA60 though, so the trend is clearly down. VIX dropped from 23.5 to 22.4 which is a slight relief but Gold is still at $5,003 — smart money hasn't changed its mind. The 10Y at 4.20% means no Fed relief coming.
key_factors: RSI 31.8 approaching oversold (<30) — historically a tactical bounce zone
SPY still below SMA20 ($680.2) and SMA60 ($685.7) — downtrend intact
Gold $5,003 — safe-haven demand unchanged, structural fear persists
us_agent.what_quant_misses: RSI approaching 30 is a key technical level that pure z-score models don't weight properly. Also, VIX term structure matters — if front-month VIX is higher than back months (backwardation), that's a stronger fear signal than the spot VIX number alone.
us_agent.forward_outlook: SPY may see a tactical bounce as RSI approaches 30. Historical win rate at this GRISI level (73% positive in 20 days) supports cautious optimism. But the bounce is likely to be sold into — no fundamental catalyst for sustained rally. Base case: SPY +1% to +4% over 20 days. Key level: SPY needs to reclaim SMA20 ($680) to confirm any reversal.

tw_agent.narrative: 今天最大的變化：外資轉買了！從連賣3天-438億到今天淨買+4.7億，雖然量不大但方向翻轉了。大盤也從33,343反彈到33,837(+1.5%)，台積電回到1870。融資餘額5天還是增+1.87%，但速度比上週的+3.42%放慢了，代表散戶追高的力道在減弱。不過台積電融資月增還是+20%，散戶信仰還在。
key_factors: 外資翻多：從連賣3天-438億到今天淨買+4.7億——方向性轉變(來源:FinMind/TWSE)
大盤反彈至33,837，站回SMA20(33,642)——短期技術面轉好
融資增速放緩：5天+1.87%(vs上週+3.42%)——散戶追高力道減弱
tw_agent.what_quant_misses: 外資從連賣轉買是一個質性轉折點，量化模型只看到累積流量的z-score，但「方向翻轉」本身的信號意義更大。另外大盤站回SMA20也是一個技術面的微妙變化。
tw_agent.forward_outlook: 短期偏中性轉樂觀。外資翻多+大盤站回均線+融資增速放緩，三個信號都在好轉。但台積電融資月增20%仍高，如果外資只是短期回補而非趨勢性買入，散戶可能再次被套。觀察重點：外資能否連續買超3天以上。GRISI分數~44在中性區間，不構成強烈反向信號。

summary.cross_market_view: US仍偏恐懼(31.5)但TW今天明顯回溫(44.2)，分歧擴大到12.7。外資在台股翻多但美股仍處技術性弱勢，形成短期分歧。歷史上US偏恐懼+TW中性的組合通常意味著全球風險還在，但亞洲市場可能領先反彈。
summary.actionable_signal: HOLD — US接近超賣但未確認反轉。TW外資翻多是正面信號但需確認持續性(連買3天+)。不急進場，等確認信號。
